inline_comments.message:
Correct me if I am wrong about this, but this will resolve to something like this:
release-name-music-cassandra-cassandra-data-release-name-music-cassandra-0
release-name-music-cassandra-cassandra-data-release-name-music-cassandra-1
release-name-music-cassandra-cassandra-data-release-name-music-cassandra-2

Not sure if we need that many cassandras in there. :)

My suggestion is to use {{ template "common.name" . }} which will resolve to:
music-cassandra-release-name-music-cassandra-0
